title: Resolve zeta/kappa condition: ZK2: zeta residual exterior-neutral branch
description: Sector: zeta_residual. Allowed condition: C_zeta = 0 outside, with no boundary shell and no recovery-tuned support. Forbidden condition: zeta_tail = C_zeta/r with C_zeta != 0. Consequence: neutral zeta metric trace is theorem-heavy but not logically forbidden.
